creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks, I was not aware how to call it with the linux jdk. I called it like this, via some ssh -X -Y connection:

JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/linux-oracle-jdk1.8.0 /usr/local/visualparadigm/Visual_Paradigm

Then the initialization step is sucessful and a window comes up. But I can't select any menues or options in that window ? Clicks do not seem to get through ?
